description_long: This fence consists of three connected sections, each made from dark brown wooden posts and rails, set on a rectangular patch of green ground. The two end sections are taller, with the leftmost section featuring a diagonal cross-brace and the rightmost section having a similar but mirrored design. The middle section is shorter and simpler, with two horizontal rails and a single diagonal brace. The posts are slender and evenly spaced, with no visible caps or decorative finials. The wood appears untreated or only lightly finished, giving the fence a rustic, utilitarian appearance. There are no gates or openings, and the structure is designed primarily as a barrier.
description: A rustic, three-section wooden fence with cross-braced end panels and a simple, low middle section, all set on a green base.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three fence sections, with the taller cross-braced panels on the ends and a shorter middle section.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the fence and the alignment of the posts and rails.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the same arrangement of cross-braced and simple panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the linear arrangement of the fence sections.
